About our spaces

Spaces designed for your stay

Each Behaven listing is set up so you can arrive and settle in — no shopping lists, no setup. Whether you're here for a week or three months, your space is furnished, connected, and stocked before you check in.

We work with corporate guests, relocating professionals, and extended-stay travellers. Tell us what you need — we'll match you to the right unit.

High-speed Wi-Fi Full kitchen Quality bedding Washer / dryer 24-hr support Secure access
